# hetzner_firewall (Data Source)

Use this data source to read firewall rules for a Hetzner dedicated server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_firewall" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (String) Server number.

### Read-Only

- `allowlist_hos` (Boolean) Allow Hetzner services.
- `filter_ipv6` (Boolean) Whether firewall also filters IPv6.
- `input` (Attributes List) Incoming traffic rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input))
- `output` (Attributes List) Outgoing traffic rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--output))
- `port` (String) Switch port.
- `server_ip` (String) Server main IP address.
- `status` (String) Firewall status.

<a id="nestedatt--input"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) Action: accept or discard.
- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port or range.
- `ip_version` (String) IP version.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `src_port` (String) Source port or range.
- `tcp_flags` (String) TCP flags.


<a id="nestedatt--output"></a>
### Nested Schema for `output`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) Action: accept or discard.
- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port or range.
- `ip_version` (String) IP version.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `src_port` (String) Source port or range.
- `tcp_flags` (String) TCP flags.
